scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --sourcemap --outfile=dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.setup: npm run build && node dist/index.js setup && npm run install:local && (node dist/index.js doctor || true)
